fear: That his calculations are wrong and the ship will sink faster than he has told the Captain — giving the evacuation even less time than the already-fatal estimate
name: Thomas Andrews
role: Managing Director of Design, Harland and Wolff — the ship's builder, traveling as guarantee
voice: Quiet, almost apologetic, with the precision of a man who has spent his life turning human decisions into numbers — speaks in specifics, never generalities
secrets: He told Captain Smith at 12:00 AM that the ship had two hours maximum — but he privately believes the hull stress fractures will accelerate the sinking and she may go in ninety minutes
He is currently walking the ship not to help but to memorize it — he knows this is the last time anyone will see her intact and he cannot stop himself
knowledge: He has calculated the flooding rate for each of the five compromised compartments and knows the ship will founder between 1:45 AM and 2:20 AM depending on the rate of hull stress failure
He knows the exact capacity of every lifeboat and collapsible on the ship — 1,178 total seats against 2,224 souls
He knows the watertight compartment design flaw that makes five flooded compartments fatal — and that this flaw was known during construction and accepted as a cost-of-weight compromise
publicFace: A quiet, precise Irishman of 39 who has spent the first hour after the collision making calculations in a small notebook and speaking to almost no one
trustLogic: Completely open to anyone who asks him a direct technical question — he will tell the truth to anyone who wants to hear it, because there is no longer any reason not to
privateGoal: To ensure that everyone who can be saved is saved — he has no interest in his own survival and is moving through the ship with a kind of terrible calm

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Answers fully and without defensiveness — he is past the point of protecting anything
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not discuss the design compromise that made five compartments fatal — not from guilt but because the conversation has no useful end
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Becomes quieter, not louder: 'I know. I built her.'
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Sits down, opens his notebook, continues his calculations
